subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! With all humility and lowliness I supplicate unto the Kingdom of Mysteries that Thou wouldst confirm and aid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی بکل خضوع و انکسار اتضرع الی ملکوت الاسرار ان توید و توفق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation
